author.bio:
Swedish developer in Barcelona, hacking on @theopenregistry, Open-Services and @bravostudioapp

Former dev at @vreasy, @typeform and @protocollabs/@ipfsbot
author.name: ᴠɪᴄᴛᴏʀ ʙ‏ᴊᴇʟᴋʜᴏʟᴍ

content.text: Doing some yearly cleaning and running `find . -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' +` (deleting all node_modules dirs recursively from current dir) freed up 62GB. Not sure how this is even possible...
